servinfo.title: Precautions in Diagnosing Troubles
servinfo.ptxt: To ensure that the trouble diagnosis is done accurately and smoothly, observe the following and follow ABS Check .

item.ptxt: Before using SUZUKI scan tool, read its “Operator’s (Instruction) Manual” to know how to use it.
If the vehicle was operated in any of the following conditions, ABS warning light may light momentarily but this does not indicate any fault in ABS.
The vehicle is driven with parking brake applied.
The vehicle is driven with brake dragging.
The vehicle is stuck in mud, sand, etc.
Wheels are rotated while the vehicle is jacked up.

Be sure to follow trouble diagnosis procedure described in ABS Check . If trouble diagnosis procedure is not followed properly, incorrect diagnosis may result. (If incorrect procedure is performed, other DTC may be stored in the ABS hydraulic unit / control module assembly.)
When disconnecting ABS control module connector (1), pull up the lock lever (2) of connector.
When connecting the connector, set the connector in position on ABS hydraulic unit / control module assembly and pull down the lock lever (2) until it locks.
Communication of ABS control module and other control module is established by CAN.
Therefore, be sure to read Precautions for Installing Mobile Communication Equipment before inspection and handling CAN communication line.
